title: Jez (clone commando)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Jez}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Jez |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|II|161|Jez}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} — Based on corresponding biographical and physical details for all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Aiwha-3 Squad]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Nice to see you back so soon, Sarge.''"
"''Couldn't stay away. You okay?''"
"''It's a laugh a minute, this job.|Jez and Kal Skirata|}} '''Jez''' was the nickname of a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] who served in [[Aiwha-3 Squad]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Trained by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Kal Skirata]], the [[Squad/Legends|unit]] first saw action in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], in which all members except Jez were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] afterward, Jez took part in a standoff on the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after a rogue group of elite [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s gained control of the [[Arca Company Barracks]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] survived the Clone Wars and later served as part of the Republic's forces that were reorganized into the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. ==Biography== "Jez" was the nickname of a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. He was a member of [[Aiwha-3 Squad]], a [[Squad/Legends|unit]] of elite [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]]. Jez and the other squad members were trained by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] to serve in the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Jez and his squad saw action in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|opening battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Fighting against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], all members of Aiwha-3 Squad except Jez were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the Battle of Geonosis, Jez was redeployed to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he took part in a standoff at the [[Arca Company Barracks]] after six rogue [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s—an elite cadre of [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]—took control of the complex. However, Skirata, Jez's old [[Cuy'val Dar|training sergeant]], was able to neutralize the situation without violence and even had [[Time/Legends|time]] to share a few words with Jez during the incident. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Clone Wars ended, and the Republic was [[Declaration of a New Order|transformed]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Jez came to serve in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Roly Melusar]] and, along with many other clone [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], took part in a briefing held by Melusar concerning measures against [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-users. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|They call us Balawai, don't they? Anyone who isn't Korunnai is a downlander, and they don't think much of them.|Jez, on the Korunnai|}} A clone of the Mandalorian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Jez stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He had a sense of humor and joked about his job as a commando even after losing three of his fellow squad members just days before on Geonosis. Jez was also delighted to meet Kal Skirata, his old training sergeant, on Coruscant. He possessed knowledge of the planet [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] and its inhabitants, being able to tell the difference between the native [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] and [[Balawai]] groups. ==Behind the scenes== Jez first appeared in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', a [[2006]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jez |pl=Jez }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Clone stormtroopers]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
